sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this document validates that {device_name_model} meets the defined user needs and intended use ({intended_use}) under actual or simulated use conditions, per ISO 13485:2016 §7.3.7. It complements verification ({ref:RD-005}) and is governed by the Design & Development Plan {ref:RD-001}.

sections.title: 2. Scope
sections.content: Applies to validation of {device_name_model} prior to commercial release. Target users: {target_users}. Validation is performed on initial production units or equivalent.

sections.title: 3. Validation Approach (ISO 13485 §7.3.7)
clauses: 3.1 Validation on initial production units, batches or equivalents
3.2 Performed under defined operating conditions and on the intended user population
3.3 Clinical evaluation / clinical investigation when required (EU MDR Annex XIV / 21 CFR 812)
3.4 Usability validation per IEC 62366-1 with representative users
3.5 Software validation per IEC 62304 / FDA Software Guidance where applicable
sections.section_prompt: For each clause, describe in 2–3 sentences how {company_legal_name} executes this for {device_name_model}. Be concrete about sample size justification, user demographics, and environment.

sections.title: 4. Validation Activities Matrix
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 8–12 validation activities for {device_name_model} addressing user needs and use scenarios for {target_users}. Mix methods: summative usability study, simulated-use, clinical investigation, field trial, expert review. Acceptance must be quantitative where possible (e.g. ≥0.85 task success, no use error of severity 4+). Return JSON array.

sections.title: 5. Clinical Evaluation Linkage
sections.section_prompt: Describe how clinical evidence supporting validation is captured in the Clinical Evaluation Report (or 510(k) clinical summary as applicable) and how post-market clinical follow-up ({ref:RA-005}, {ref:RA-006}) maintains validation over the product lifecycle. Tailor to {device_name_model}.

sections.title: 6. Validation Conclusion
sections.section_prompt: Provide a release-decision conclusion summarising validation outcomes for {device_name_model}, residual risk acceptability (linked to {ref:RD-007}), and authorisation for design transfer ({ref:RD-008}) and market release.
